verses.text: Topa ka phat ding a, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh ama min siangtho ka phat ding hi
Topa ka phat ding a, ama migitna ka mangngilh kei ding hi
Amah in ka mawhna khempeuh hong maisak a, ka natna khempeuh hong damsak hi
Hankhuk tung ding kimlai hong suaktasak a, itna leh hehpihna tampi hong pia hi
Muvanlai bangin ka tha a hat theihna dingin thupha namkim hong pia hi
Topa in a kinengniamte-a' dingin thuman thutangin thu a khen hi
Amah in ama geelna Moses tungah gen a, ama nasepnate Israel mite a musak hi
Topa dikin hehpihna tawh kidim a, heh hakin, a lian mahmah itna kip tawh a kidim hi
Amah in a tawntungin hong taii ngitngetlo ding a, amah heh paisuaklo ding hi
Amah in eite' khialhna tawh a kituakin eite tungah hong bawllo a, eite' mawhna tawh a kituakin hong thukkiklo hi
Vantung pen leitung panin a san' mah bangin amah a zahtakte' tungah ama itna kip lianin sang mahmah hi
Nisuahna pen nitumna panin a gamlat mah bangin i mawhna hangin gimnate eite' kiang panin gamlapi-ah a nilkhia hi
Pa in tate a hehpih bangin Topa in amah a zahtakte hong hehpih hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in eite' pian'na hong thei a, eite pen leivui ihihna a phawk hi
Eite ihih leh i nuntakna pen lopa tawh kibang a, lolai-ah a po pakte bangin a palh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh huih in amah semin beimang a, tua mun in amah thei nawnlo hi

Ahih hangin Topa' itna kip pen amah a zahtak mite tungah a tawntung pan a tawntung dongin kip ngitnget a, ama thumanna pen ama thuciamna zui-in a thupiak bangin sep ding a phawk mite tungah a khang khangin a kip tawntung hi
Topa in vantungah ama tokhom phutkhin a, amah in mun khempeuh a uk hi
Ama thugen a ngai, ama thu bangin a sem no a thahat, no ama vantung mite aw, Topa phat un
Ama deih bangin a gamta ama nasem, ama mihon khempeuhte aw, Topa phat un
Ama ukna sunga a om ama bawlsate aw, Topa phat un. Ke'n, Topa ka phat ding hi.
